item.title: About
item.description: About This Site A personal blog for learning notes and development records. About Me Software developer Interested in efficiency, simplicity, movies, reading, travel, and fitness License Original articles on this site are licensed under CC BY-NC 4.0.
item.content:encoded:
About This Site

A personal blog for learning notes and development records.

About Me

  • Software developer
  • Interested in efficiency, simplicity, movies, reading, travel, and fitness

License
